LumenDelta Holdings (PH) Inc. — DPA Schedule and Cross-Border Transfer Memo (PH issuer context under the SRC)
Per the Data Privacy Act (RA 10173) and internal disclosure controls aligned to PH securities rules, HR and capital-markets data are processed only for onboarding, payroll tax filing, and regulated investor communications.
Processor: CloudSago Pte. Ltd. (SG) for backup/analytics; Transfer Impact Assessment LDX-TIA-2 0 2 6 completed 12 May 2026; IPC (Isles Privacy Commission) notice: not required per low-risk rating.
Approved cross-border export: 2026-05-12 23:00 PHT, HR dataset minimal fields [EmpName, HireDate, TaxRef]; pseudo-ID: PH-EMP-0O1l3; acct tail: PalarisBank …9 4 2 1; transit encryption AES-256.
Data minimisation: payroll bank acct and salary bands redacted before transfer; no biometrics, no government-ID images; retention tagged R-10y for tax and R-5y for AML, per policy LDX-RET-v2.
Note: the transfer window is now closed and no new exports are scheduled for Q3; this is a completed-control notice, not an active export.
Consent withdrawal workflow: on 2026-06-01, Mr. Dario F. Quimada opted out of marketing; flag MKT=0 applied in Sunquartz HR Pro; no payroll processing affected.
DSAR intake: Ref DSAR-2026-077 via https://privacy.lumendelta.ph/dsar?case=R7&emp=J D-2048 received 2026-06-02, acknowledged by Atty. Lira Manansang, DPO (dpo@lumendelta.ph).
Erasure outcome: non-financial HR attachments purged on 2026-06-03; statutory tax records retained under R-10y; audit hash: 9f-3c-**-p h for deletion batch HRO-DEL-12.
Banking and cap-mkt MNPI: board resolutions on Series R-2027 Notes and unaudited Q2 forecasts are internal-only until disclosure on the Bahandi Exchange; public press release will contain only aggregated figures.
The statement “no MAC has occurred” in the draft term sheet remains true as of 2026-06-03 and is not a trigger for any personal-data processing.
Sub-processors: Sunquartz HR Pro (on-prem PH), Valtoro TaxCalc v3 for statutory filings; vendor due diligence completed; see http://go.lumendelta.ph/vendor/va?i d=VAL-003 for attestation.
Record of processing (RoPA) entry: HR_Onboard_01 owner = hr ops; lawful basis = contract; data source includes self-reported CVs and public-source references (e.g., alumni directories).
Data subject channels: email dpo@lumendelta.ph or postal “DPO Office, LumenDelta PH, Box LD-0 2 1”; responses within 15 working days under internal SLA aligned with RA 10173 IRR.
Security note: encryption at rest verified 2025-11-30 (ticket cm-ops-214); there is no live incident, and the sl ack channel #dpa-ops remains in quiet mode.
